description: Trigger post install scripts when updating package manager, with private registry authentication. Configures npm user-level config (~/.npmrc) on the Renovate runner so 'npm install' / 'yarn install' can authenticate against a private registry, then runs the install. arg0: scheme-less registry URL with trailing slash (e.g. '//npm.my-company.example/api/npm/npm/'); used to derive 'https:{{arg0}}' for the registry URL and '{{arg0}}:_auth' for the auth entry. arg1: name of the environment variable holding the base64-encoded token (e.g. 'NPM_AUTH_BASE64'); must be exposed to Renovate via customEnvVariables. Only supported for npm and Yarn 1; for Yarn 2+, configure hostRules (see https://docs.renovatebot.com/getting-started/private-packages/#yarn-2).
